summary.en: Are you spending valuable time opening and organizing hundreds of local files and password-protected quotations one by one? With AIP, analysis is completed on the spot — without uploads and without data exposure.
summary.ko: Are you spending valuable time opening and organizing hundreds of local files and password-protected quotations one by one? With AIP, analysis is completed on the spot — without uploads and without data exposure.
summary.ja: 数百におよぶローカルファイルや、パスワード付きの見積書を一つひとつ開いて整理する作業に、貴重な時間を費やしていませんか？AIPなら、アップロード不要・データ流出なしで、その場で分析を完了します。
